title: Chhaava
tmdbOverview: Shivaji's death sparks the Maratha-Mughal conflict. His son Sambhaji leads resistance against Aurangzeb's forces. Amid battles and intrigue, both sides face challenges in a struggle for power.
synopsis: Released in 2025, Chhaava is a history, action and drama film from India. It holds a solid 7.3 rating on IMDb. It appears on several of our curated Top 10 lists. It carries a 15 certification (GB rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
